title: How a CEO and Trump donor is weaponizing tariffs against his rivals
description: Cambria CEO Marty Davis has successfully asked the U.S. government to put tariffs on quartz. His business competitors are crying foul.

title: New burn bans and Trump's battle with immigration and DEI are impacting forest fires
description: Firefighters say setting fires on purpose is one of the best  ways to protect against massive wildfires later. But the Trump administration is banning or stalling preventative burning across the U.S.

title: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
description: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.

title: New York Magazine reviewing work of writer facing plagiarism allegations
description: The high-profile writer, who has written a forthcoming book about New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani, is being investigated by the magazine after being called out for copying the work of other writers.

title: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy loses in Republican primary, does not advance to runoff
description: Sen. Bill Cassidy is one of few remaining Republican senators who voted for President Trump's impeachment after the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. Trump endorsed his opponent, Rep. Julia Letlow.

title: Election day confusion in Louisiana after voting changes
description: The governor of Louisiana canceled the U.S. House primaries after tens of thousands of votes had already been cast. On Election Day, we hear from voters trying to make sense of the last-minute changes.

title: Trump’s China summit shows toll of a difficult year for the president
description: A year ago, Trump promised a new era during the first major foreign trip of his second term. On his recent visit to Beijing, the war with Iran and economic strain clouded his diplomacy.

title: He’s a Democrat in Trump country. He says his party became ‘too urban.’
description: In North Carolina, Jamie Ager is distancing himself from his national party to win a congressional seat.

title: This Republican voted to convict Trump. Now he's up for reelection. Can he survive?
description: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy was one of seven Republican senators who voted to convict President Trump. Now he's running for reelection in a race that will test Trump's hold on the GOP.

title: Week in Politics: Trump's Beijing visit; look ahead at the primaries; the war on Iran
description: We look at the tangible takeaways from President Trump's visit to Beijing, as well as what to expect in the next crop of primaries, and the status of the war on Iran.

title: This Republican voted to convict Trump. Now he's up for reelection. Can he survive?
description: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy was one of seven Republican senators who voted to convict President Trump. Now he's running for reelection in a race that will test Trump's hold on the GOP.

title: Parents of teens who break curfew in D.C. will be prosecuted, DOJ says
description: The Justice Department’s crackdown on crime comes ahead of 250th anniversary events in the nation’s capital.

title: Federal civil rights watchdog wants to stop tracking data on race and sex
description: The EEOC has proposed ending a civil-rights-era program collecting demographic information from private companies.

title: Supreme Court is death knell for Virginia's Democratic-friendly congressional map
description: The new map was drawn by Democrats and approved by voters, but Virginia's high court nullified the referendum because lawmakers failed to follow proper procedure to get the issue on the ballot.

title: Under Trump, State Department language on migration echoes that of white nationalists
description: The State Department is changing the way the U.S. talks about migration and refugees, embracing the "Great Replacement" theory promoted by white nationalists.

title: Immigration hearing casts two different views of Virginia’s Fairfax County
description: Republicans accused Fairfax County Commonwealth’s Attorney Steve Descano of allowing people in the country illegally to get away with serious crimes.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: A golden statue of Trump draws mixed reactions at his golf course
description: Online, the glittering statue of Trump has become a flash point. In real life, golfers seem less excited.
